magic_lamp.title: Find a Magic Lamp in a Genie Tombstone structure (desert biome) — guarded by Zombies and Skeletons

wish_made.title: Make a wish from the Genie — right-click the summoned Genie to receive the Gold Crown or other wish items

subtitle.text: The Genie offers three wishes. The Gold Crown is one of them. Re-roll for 5 XP levels. The Genie cannot be dismissed.

description: CH.12 · AS YOU WISH
▸ As You Wish adds the Genie system.
Magic Lamp in a desert tomb.
Summon the Genie. Make a wish.
One of the wishes gives the Gold Crown.
The Gold Crown is an Iron's Spellbooks item
that requires the Genie to obtain in this pack.
There is no other source.
◈ MAGIC LAMP ACQUISITION
└ Location: Genie Tombstone structure
Spawns in desert biomes (surface structure)
└ Guarded by: Zombies and Skeletons (standard mob spawn)
└ Clear the structure, loot the tomb, find the Lamp
└ Magic Lamp: single-use item per Lamp found
Each new Lamp = new Genie summon + fresh wishes
◈ GENIE WISHES
└ Right-click the Lamp to summon the Genie entity
└ Genie offers wish options (randomized per summon)
└ Re-roll wishes: costs 5 XP levels
Re-roll as many times as needed for the Gold Crown
└ ▲ IMPORTANT: the Genie cannot be dismissed
Once summoned, you MUST interact to proceed
Do not summon in unsafe locations
└ Gold Crown (`irons_spellbooks:gold_crown`): ISS headgear
High mana capacity + ISS casting bonus
This is the best ISS headgear available
◈ GOLD CROWN (goldcrownissb mod)
└ Adds a CRAFTING RECIPE for the Gold Crown
that requires the Genie wish system
└ Meaning: Gold Crown REQUIRES completing As You Wish
└ You cannot obtain it through any other means
in this pack (no JEI bypass, no shop purchase)
▸ Every wish that has been made
was made in a desert.
The desert is where you find out
what you actually need.
The Genie already knew.
It just waits for you to ask.
▶ Find a Magic Lamp in a Genie Tombstone [check]
▶ Make a wish — obtain the Gold Crown [check]
◇ Gold Crown = best ISS mana headgear.
Pair with Ring of Mana × 2 + Ancient Codex.
This is the full mana-capacity endgame setup.
Do this before any Ch13 boss casting setup.
